title: 日本ダービーの後に・希望の灯光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is finished—Narita Top Road places first.
For the first time, Admire Vega feels a sense of
regret.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, it is that exact feeling that fuels her for
the next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next is the final race of the Classic Triple Crown,
the Kikuka Sho. Admire Vega promises her rivals
that they will compete once again there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, they happily await the approaching
summer.
